The '''''Free Mandalore''''' was a modified [[Kubrai-class S4 transport|''Kubrai''-class S4 transport]] produced by [[Kubrai Transportation]]. In addition it served as [[Fenn Shysa]]'s personal starship, which he used during the race for the [[Tessent]].

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|9|Race for the Tessent}} {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
